          +---------+
          |  Input  |
          +----+----+
               |
               |
               v
         +-----------+
         |  Process  |
         +-----+-----+
               |
       +-------+---------+
       |                 |
       v                 v
+-------------+   +------------+
|  Transform  |   |  Validate  |
+------+------+   +------+-----+
       |                 |
       |                 |
       +--------+--------+
                v
          +----------+
          |  Output  |
          +----------+
